contract_claim: L320-323: _prompt_model_defaults accesses defaults['small'], defaults['medium'], and defaults['large'] by hard-coded key without guarding against missing tiers. If any BUILTIN_PROVIDER_MODELS entry omits a tier, this raises KeyError.
observed_behavior: Use defaults.get('small', '') or verify BUILTIN_PROVIDER_MODELS schema guarantees all three tiers for every provider entry.
